description: Aircall is a cloud-based phone system that provides VoIP calling, call routing, IVR, call recording, analytics, and integrations with CRM and helpdesk tools.
authentication: API key (Bearer token) or OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow for the API. The web app supports email/password login and SSO via SAML.
self_serve: Yes – customers can manage users, billing, and settings via the Aircall web portal.
api_surface: RESTful API with JSON payloads. Endpoints include calls, contacts, extensions, teams, users, webhooks, and more. Supports pagination, filtering, and webhook events.
buildability: Good – comprehensive REST API, clear documentation, no SDK required. Rate limits are moderate (60 requests per minute).
main_blocker: Rate limiting (60 requests per minute) and limited coverage of advanced features (e.g., no direct support for conference call management via API).
